name: zindex_archive_flush_index_to_tail
description: zIndexArchive::FlushIndexToTail appends the record table and {magic=1, recordCount} trailer to the archive file, then clears the dirty flag.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?FlushIndexToTail@zIndexArchive@@QAEXXZ at 0x4a6360 still fails: 50 unmasked mismatches, 8 relocation bytes masked, 15 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 129 bytes, VC object symbol size 144 bytes.

Reviewed difference is local scheduling/register allocation around SetFilePointer/WriteFile and record-byte-count calculation; the original computes the byte count before seeking, while VC schedules it after SetFilePointer.
The native smoke forces dirty close, validates the written file size and trailer, and confirms the dirty flag is cleared.
